misses_at_5.question: What degree did I graduate with?
How long is my daily commute to work?
What was my previous occupation?
What was the discount I got on my first purchase from the new clothing brand?
How much is the painting of a sunset worth in terms of the amount I paid for it?
What type of rice is my favorite?
What time do I stop checking work emails and messages?
What is the name of the music streaming service have I been using lately?
What is the name of my hamster?
How much time do I dedicate to practicing violin every day?
What did my dad gave me as a birthday gift?
How many projects have I led or am currently leading?
How many days did I spend attending workshops, lectures, and conferences in April?
How many days did it take for my iPad case to arrive after I bought it?
Can you recommend some recent publications or conferences that I might find interesting?
Can you recommend some interesting cultural events happening around me this weekend?
Can you recommend a show or movie for me to watch tonight?
Can you suggest some activities that I can do in the evening?
What should I serve for dinner this weekend with my homegrown ingredients?
I've been feeling a bit stuck with my paintings lately. Do you have any ideas on how I can find new inspiration?
I've been having trouble with the battery life on my phone lately. Any tips?
I've been feeling like my chocolate chip cookies need something extra. Any advice?
I've been sneezing quite a bit lately. Do you think it might be my living room?
I've been feeling nostalgic lately. Do you think it would be a good idea to attend my high school reunion?
Can you suggest some useful accessories for my phone?
Can you suggest some activities I can do during my commute to work?
How long have I been working in my current role?
How many years older am I than when I graduated from college?
What is the total number of siblings I have?
At which university did I present a poster for my undergrad course research project?
What is the order of the three trips I took in the past three months, from earliest to latest?
What is the order of the three sports events I participated in during the past month, from earliest to latest?
How many months passed between the completion of my undergraduate degree and the submission of my master's thesis?
I mentioned participating in a sports event two weeks ago. What was the event?
I received a piece of jewelry last Saturday from whom?
What charity event did I participate in a month ago?
What gardening-related activity did I do two weeks ago?
I mentioned that I participated in an art-related event two weeks ago. Where was that event held at?
What was the the life event of one of my relatives that I participated in a week ago?
Who did I meet with during the lunch last Tuesday?
I mentioned cooking something for my friend a couple of days ago. What was it?
What was the significant buisiness milestone I mentioned four weeks ago?
What did I do with Rachel on the Wednesday two months ago?
I mentioned an investment for a competition four weeks ago? What did I buy?
What kitchen appliance did I buy 10 days ago?
Where did I attend the religious activity last week?
What was the social media activity I participated 5 days ago?
Which event happened first, my attendance at a cultural festival or the start of my Spanish classes?
How many days had passed between the day I bought a gift for my brother's graduation ceremony and the day I bought a birthday gift for my best friend?
How often do I attend yoga classes to help with my anxiety?
How many Italian restaurants have I tried in my city?
